source.title: BSEE Gulf of Mexico Region Accident Investigation Report - Structural Damage to Crane

actions_taken: Crane operations suspended on 6-JAN-2015 after turbo charger malfunction detected
Sparrows Crane Service mechanic brought on board to repair turbo charger
Crane returned to service after repairs completed
Full crane inspection conducted after boom damage discovered
All crane operations shut down following inspection
event.summary: On 9-JAN-2015 at approximately 0600 hours, during a routine lift operation on the NABORS MODS 200 crane at Platform B SIMBA in MC Block 21, the crane boom struck the boom pad causing structural damage to the boom heel. Investigation revealed that the high angle kick-out (boom hoist high limiter) safety device was adjusted all the way in, rendering it non-operational. This device is designed to prevent the crane boom from striking the boom pad. Both day and night crane operators had initialed Daily/Pre-Use Crane Inspection forms from 7-JAN-15 through 13-JAN-15 verifying the high angle boom kick-out was checked for proper operation, despite the device being inoperable.

threats.name: High angle kick-out safety device failure or malfunction
Inadequate inspection and verification of safety device status
Boom exceeds maximum angle during lifting operations

consequences.name: Potential personnel injury from falling boom or debris

controls.name: High angle kick-out (boom hoist high limiter)
controls.barrier_role: Prevents crane boom from exceeding maximum angle and striking boom pad
controls.lod_basis: Primary mechanical safety device designed to stop boom at maximum angle

supporting_text: the high angle kick-out or boom hoist high limiter on the crane body was found to be adjusted all the way in, rendering this safety device non-operational
With the high angle kick-out adjusted in all the way, there were no other safety measures in place to stop the crane boom from striking the boom pad and damaging the boom heel

controls.name: Daily/Pre-Use Crane Inspection
controls.barrier_role: Verification that safety devices are operational before crane use
controls.lod_basis: Procedural control to detect non-operational safety devices prior to operations

supporting_text: Both Crane Operators initialed the Daily/Pre-Use Crane Inspection form verifiying the the high angle boom kick-out was checked for proper operation from 7-JAN-15 thru 13-JAN-15

Both Crane Operators (day and night) initialed the Daily/Pre-Use Crane Inspection form verifying the high angle boom kick-out was checked for proper operation from 1-7-15 thru 1-13-15. NOTE: The form states Initial = OK and No = Discrepancy

controls.name: Boom pawl safety device
controls.barrier_role: Prevents freefall of crane boom if winch brakes fail
controls.lod_basis: Secondary mechanical safety device to prevent catastrophic boom failure

supporting_text: the boom pawl locked-in. (The boom pawl is a safety device on the crane winch which will prevent the freefall of the crane boom if the winch brakes fail)

controls.name: Crane operator training and qualification
controls.barrier_role: Ensures operators have knowledge to properly inspect and operate crane safely
controls.lod_basis: Personnel competency control to ensure proper equipment operation and inspection

supporting_text: Was operator qualified on this type of crane? Y
How much actual operational time did operator have on this particular crane involved in this incident? Years:0 Months 8
List recent crane operator training dates. 9/20/2013

controls.name: Crane maintenance and repair procedures
controls.barrier_role: Ensures crane components are properly maintained and repaired to operational standards
controls.lod_basis: Procedural control to maintain equipment integrity and safety device functionality

supporting_text: On 6-JAN-2015 the crane began smoking during lifting operations (Crew A). It was determined that the turbo charger was malfunctioning
A Mechanic from Sparrows Crane Service was brought on board to begin repairs

What was the date of most recent crane maintenance performed? 09-JAN-2015 Who performed crane maintenance? (Please clarify persons name or company name.) SPARROWS What type of maintenance was performed? replacing turbo charger

notes.rules: JSON output only. mentioned fields must be evidence-based. Use null for unknown values.
